final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a platform announcement about GPT-image-2 launching on Lovart, designed for Xiaohongshu cover format.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine aesthetic, clean typography-driven layout, Vogue/Elle cover style
Composition: diagonal composition, text and visual elements arranged along a strong diagonal axis from bottom-left to top-right, dynamic tension
Subject: bold typographic announcement featuring "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as hero text
Scene/backdrop: minimal sophisticated background with subtle texture or gradient, negative space to emphasize text
Lighting/mood: dramatic high-contrast lighting, editorial studio lighting feel, confident and premium
Color palette: high-contrast accent color scheme, deep neutral base with one bold accent color for emphasis
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" "Lovart"
Constraints: must read clearly at mobile thumbnail size; text hierarchy must be instantly scannable
Avoid: generic stock imagery, cluttered layout, low contrast text, watermark, decorative elements that compete with typography
